name: Inflection-1
archDisplay: Dense Transformer (architecture, dataset, and training procedure undisclosed)
note: Pi's original in-house model; GPT-3.5-class personal-AI chatbot tuned for empathetic conversation over coding or reasoning.

results.notes: Average across 57 MMLU tasks; outperformed GPT-3.5, LLaMA, and PaLM-540B per Inflection's technical memo.
8-shot chain-of-thought prompt (Table 8 of the Inflection-1 technical memo); GPT-4 92.0, PaLM-2-L 80.7 shown alongside for context.
0-shot (Table 4 of the technical memo); a 10-shot figure of 85.8 is also reported (Table 5) but 0-shot is used here as the memo's primary comparison setting.
pass@1, 3-shot prompt (Table 9 of the technical memo).
pass@1, 0-shot (Table 9). Memo explicitly notes code generation is the one benchmark where Inflection-1 underperforms GPT-3.5 (48.1).
BIG-Bench Hard with chain-of-thought prompting (Table 6 of the technical memo).
0-shot (Table 7); a 1-shot figure of 83.3 is also reported.

0-shot, unfiltered-web dev split ('Split A', Table 3); this is the figure behind the public blog's claim of a 2.1-point edge over LLaMA-65B (68.2). Three other TriviaQA/split-and-shot variants are also reported (up to 85.0 on the Wikipedia split, 1-shot) but this one was chosen as the standard 0-shot comparison point.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via direct fetch of inflection.ai/inflection-1: page literally states '72.7% on average across all 57 tasks' on MMLU, matching the score exactly. Fetch also confirmed the June 22 2023 announcement date. No changes made.
